text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka keeps training for the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her body seems incapable of running
continuously at top speed, and her leg has begun
to hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worried about her condition, Special Week
suggests it may be best for her to withdraw from
the upcoming Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Silence Suzuka doesn't give in to
Special Week's plea, unyielding in her
determination to run.
